name: Samba Walks in PP Position (RF and LF) (Promenade Samba Walks)
preceding_figure_names: Maypole, Criss Cross Voltas, Shadow Circular Volta, Shadow Traveling Volta
following_figure_names: Shadow Circular Volta, Shadow Traveling Volta, Whisk To Left
notes:
Samba walks can be danced on same foot as partner when in R shadow position.
Silver & Gold: Samba Walks are danced in RSP during Rolling off the Arm.
Preceding Figures for Samba Walk in PP: RF
Bota Fogos To Promenade and Counter Promenade
Criss Cross Bota Fogos (Shadow Bota Fogos)
Foot Change 4: Right Shadow Position to Promenade Position
Foot Change 6: R Contra Position to Promenade Position
Maypole
Natural Basic Movement
Reverse Basic Movement
Samba Walk in PP: LF
Shadow Circular Volta with LF
Shadow Traveling Volta commenced with LF
Side Basic Movement
Traveling Bota Fogos Back
Following Figures for Samba Walk in PP: RF
Shadow Circular Volta with RF
Shadow Traveling Volta commenced with RF
Samba Walk in PP: RF
Samba Walk: Side
Whisk To Left
Preceding Figures for Samba Walk in PP: LF
Criss Cross Voltas
Natural Basic Movement
Promenade And Counter Promenade Runs
Reverse Basic Movement
Rolling Off The Arm
Samba Walk in PP: RF
Samba Walk: Side
Bota Fogos To Promenade and Counter Promenade (4-9)
Side Samba Walk in Promenade Position
Going from Side Samba walk to Boto Fogos: man keep the forward motion to keep lady moving, man holds back (without stepping back).

steps.action: take minimal weight and draw LF back in PP
